case_title: RYAN, DENISE L. vs. PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATES,INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RYAN, DENISE L. AS TO DEFENDANT PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT ASSOCIATES,INC. DBA SYBERVISION SYSTEMS, INC. JACOBSON, RICHARD
